name: Urban Surveillance Integration Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Embeds real-time surveillance data into narrative → Systemic: 25% faster scaling through Hong Kong's existing infrastructure → Strategic: Creates unmatchable claustrophobia but risks over-reliance on local tech constraints.
options: Leverage official CCTV feeds for real-time environmental tension
Use anonymized Octopus card data to map protagonist's movements
Develop a biometric access system as a central plot device
review: Controls Authenticity vs. Technical Feasibility. Weakness: The options fail to consider regulatory hurdles in accessing real surveillance systems.

name: Director-Centric Collaborative Model
consequences: Immediate: Ensures local architectural nuance → Systemic: 20% lower production friction through cultural alignment → Strategic: Balances global appeal with Hong Kong's cinematic DNA.

Form a collective of emerging Hong Kong filmmakers to co-direct
review: Controls Creative Vision vs. Marketability. Weakness: The options understate the challenge of maintaining a cohesive narrative with multiple directorial voices.
